title: ProbeDeepOutput
description: Output of `--probe-deep` flag (v0.7.3+). Returns CAPTCHA detection status with mitigation hints. Production path uses Chrome DOM navigation (GAP-WS-113 / ADR-0016); residual HTTP is test-only.

status.description: ok = no interstitial, captcha = Cloudflare/DDG challenge detected.

endpoint.description: Endpoint that was probed (currently only html).

http_status.description: HTTP status code of the probe response (often 202 even when captcha is detected).

cascade_level.description: Cascade level reached during the probe (0..=4).

cascata_motivo.description: Identifier of the failure mode (e.g., 'cloudflare_anomaly_modal', 'ddg_anomaly'). 'none' when no failure.
